topic: traditional method second fermentation in bottle
trigger_keywords: metodo tradicional del metodo de tanque

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Liqueur de tirage is added to a base-wine blend and the wine is sealed in the bottle in which it will later be sold.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Yeast performs a second alcoholic fermentation in that sealed bottle, so the carbon dioxide produced dissolves into the wine.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Pressure and sparkle are created in the final bottle, which then permits lees ageing, riddling, and disgorgement.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Pressure and sparkle are created in the final bottle, which then permits lees ageing, riddling, and disgorgement.
